annual_rate.notes: Post-judgment interest at 9% per annum under 735 ILCS 5/2-1303 for general judgments — fixed by statute, computed as simple interest on the unsatisfied portion of the judgment. Carve-out: 6% per annum where the judgment debtor is a unit of local government. Verify against the statute; not legal advice.
